response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched the video and identified the title card 'FUWAMOCO WachaWacha Birthday Festival 2026'.
2. Identified the virtual characters as FUWAMOCO.
3. Noted the song title 'Lifetime Showtime' from on-screen text during the performance.
4. Performed web search for '"Lifetime Showtime" FUWAMOCO lyrics'.
5. Found multiple bilingual sources confirming the lyrics are a mix of Japanese and English.
6. Structured the JSON to include the introductory scenes and the performance scene with the bilingual lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual concert performance by the hololive English VTubers FUWAMOCO, starting with an introductory scene followed by member introductions and the main performance of their song "Lifetime Showtime".

scenes.description: Introductory scene featuring the 'FUWAMOCO WachaWacha Birthday Festival 2026' title card.
Performance of the song 'Lifetime Showtime' by FUWAMOCO.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
It's show time!
一緒にいたいよ (Issho ni itai yo)
Lifetime, Showtime
Anytime, BAU BAU!
Yeah, future is bright
Fluffy, fuzzy, yappy sisters
Fuwa! Moco!
BAU BAU BAU!
My heart 'n soul 'n tail are FUWAWA (Yay!)
I'm so fluffy that even I could float away
Just call for me, we're only a bark away
Your smile is the treasure that I wanna keep safe
